name: Number F0: Utopic Future
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＦＮｏ．</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>フューチャーナンバーズ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>０ <ruby lang="jp"><rb>未</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>み</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>来</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>らい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>皇</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ホープ
desc:
2 Xyz Monsters with the same Rank, except "Number" monsters
(This card's original Rank is always treated as 1.)
Cannot be destroyed by battle, and neither player takes any battle damage from attacks involving this card. At the end of the Damage Step, if this card battled an opponent's monster: You can take control of that opponent's monster until the end of the Battle Phase. If this face-up card on the field would be destroyed by card effect, you can detach 1 material from this card instead.

jp_sets.set: Coco's x Yu-Gi-Oh! Card Game Anniversary Campaign 2024 Part 2

action: Takes control of an opponent's monster
mst: Does not have effects which detach Xyz Materials for cost
Cannot be destroyed by card effects
summoning: Requires Xyz Monsters as Xyz Materials
